creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Off-topic from Asciidoctor, but to avoid any future confusion: 

> developer

When I became a committer, the "few words about me" made unmistakably clear that (contrary to misclassifications) I am _not_ a developer. 

Beyond that, I prefer to not discuss in Bugzilla; I should repeat the word 'discreet'.
